title: Dashboard
zombie_alert: {{count}} zombie process detected — visit Processes page to clean up.
zombie_alert_plural: {{count}} zombie processes detected — visit Processes page to clean up.
optimize_all_what: Runs mo clean + mo optimize via Mole CLI
optimize_all_covers: Covers: Homebrew, npm/pnpm/yarn, pip, Cargo, Go, app caches, service workers, system optimizations
optimize_all_excludes: Not included: Docker, browser GPU/AI caches, Playwright, VS Code extensions — use the Cleanup page for those
